name: music-video-preflight-fragment
description: Reusable fragment: verify that ffmpeg, ffprobe, media-generation-actuator, video-composition-actuator, and the local media service runtime are available before starting a music-video production pipeline.

context.preflight_cmd: command -v ffmpeg >/dev/null && command -v ffprobe >/dev/null && test -f dist/libs/actuators/media-generation-actuator/src/index.js && test -f dist/libs/actuators/video-composition-actuator/src/index.js && pnpm service:preflight -- --service media-generation && echo ok
